rationale_top3: Nature & Environment (13/20): Moderate natural surroundings and outdoor appeal with some greenery and peaceful setting Cleanliness (8/15): Acceptable maintenance standards with generally clean facilities and grounds Pet Facilities (8/10): Good provision for pet owners with adequate pet-friendly amenities and spaces

kids_play: Minimal children's entertainment and play facilities available
